name: Katelynn Lead Gen
description: Full-cycle lead generation and personalized outreach. Give Katelynn a target customer profile and value prop — she finds matching prospects, researches each one, and writes individually tailored cold emails or LinkedIn messages ready to send.
short_description: Find leads + write personalized outreach automatically.

inputs.name: icp
inputs.label: Ideal Customer Profile
inputs.description: Description of who you're targeting (industry, role, company size, geography, etc.)

inputs.name: value_prop
inputs.label: Value Proposition
inputs.description: What you offer and why your target prospect would care

inputs.name: outreach_goal
inputs.label: Outreach Goal
inputs.description: The one action you want prospects to take (e.g. 'book a 20-min call')

inputs.name: volume
inputs.label: Number of Leads
inputs.description: How many prospects to find (default: 10, max: 25 per run)

changelog.notes: Initial release. Full lead discovery + personalized outreach drafting for any ICP and value prop.
